messages.content: You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Software release changelog causes unnecessary turbine downtime during upgrade sequence Service team reported that the release training material does not include updated commissioning checklist.

Investigation shows that the fault counter increments even when no real fault condition exists. The problem is reproducible when a power curtailment command from the grid operator is triggered.

Please check if this was addressed in the latest patch.

You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Fails PO activation procedure with parameter error when using power optimization strategy During normal operation the CIM root cause tracking has outdated configuration integrity check rules.

This has been reported on 7 turbines at Alpha Ventus. The issue has been increasing in frequency since the last release update.

Urgent fix needed as this causes production loss at site.

You are a wind turbine technical support assistant. Given a Jira ticket summary and description, classify the ticket into the correct component category.

Pitch bearing monitoring not working as expected – fails pressure acceptance test after maintenance Multiple turbines at Cactus Flats are experiencing an issue where the soft starter hardware triggers light and tower door alarm without cause.

The alarm was first seen after an emergency stop activation during testing. The alarm triggers a derate that persists until manual acknowledgment.

Urgent fix needed as this causes production loss at site.

Turbine type: V164, Software version: 2025.04.178.
Related observation: |231423|Orient 1 & 2|V120 2
